metadata.author: Mark
metadata.subject: The Gospel of God — Proclaiming That Jesus Christ Is the Slave-Savior.

1: The beginning of the gospel of Jesus Christ, the Son of God.
And immediately, coming up out of the water, He saw the heavens being parted and the Spirit like a dove descending upon Him.
10: For even the Son of Man did not come to be served, but to serve and to give His life as a ransom for many.

45.text: As the Slave-Savior, Christ’s service reached its peak in the giving of His own life to pay the price for man's redemption.
